meta.title: Construction Waste Recycling Line Brochure | WEI LAN Resources
meta.description: Review what the WEI LAN Construction Waste Recycling Line Brochure covers for C&D, decoration, demolition, and bulky waste projects.

bodyHtml:
Brochure

Construction Waste Recycling Line Brochure

A product overview for buyers evaluating integrated crushing, screening, separation, baling, and digital management for C&D waste recovery.

Type: Product brochure Updated: 2026-06-30 Buyer fit: C&D and bulky waste projects Review time: 10 min

What this resource covers

  • Supported waste types: construction, decoration, demolition, and bulky waste
  • Core process modules from feeding to output recovery
  • Typical outputs such as aggregates, metals, light materials, and baled recyclables
  • Project inputs needed before line configuration discussion

When to use this resource

Use this brochure when evaluating a new C&D waste plant, upgrading an existing sorting line, or preparing an internal feasibility review.

Request this resource

Related resources

Plan a C&D waste project

Review product details, service support, and RFQ inputs before requesting a proposal.
